summary: Iteration 135: Tested all 3 PWA apps (AppCliente, AppComerciales, AppInstaladores) and CRA Dashboard with real backend data. All apps successfully connect to MongoDB via FastAPI. 21/21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed all apps load correctly with real data.

issues: Cookie consent banner blocks bottom navigation - users need to dismiss it first

seed_data_creation: Demo client user and installation seeded on startup via seed_client_demo() in client_app_routes.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 PWA apps now use real MongoDB data instead of mock data. Client App uses /api/client-app/login for auth. Comercial and Instalador apps use /api/gestion/auth/login. CRA Dashboard loads real data from /api/cra/dashboard, /api/cra/alarms, /api/cra/installations. Socket.IO attempts WebSocket connection but falls back to polling in preview environment (403 on WSS). Demo installation has 10 devices and generates arm/disarm events.

backend_tests: POST /api/client-app/login with wrong password - returns 401 - PASSED
GET /api/client-app/installation/{id} - returns devices, armed_status, address - PASSED
POST /api/gestion/auth/login with wrong password - returns 401 - PASSED
GET /api/gestion/comercial/mis-stats - returns total, cerrados, pendientes, comisiones - PASSED
frontend_tests: AppCliente login page loads at /app-cliente - PASSED
AppCliente login with demo credentials shows dashboard - PASSED
AppCliente shows 10 devices from real data - PASSED
AppCliente arm controls (TOTAL, PARCIAL, DESARMAR) visible - PASSED
AppCliente SOS EMERGENCIA button visible - PASSED
AppComerciales login page loads at /app-comerciales - PASSED
AppComerciales login shows dashboard with KPIs - PASSED
AppComerciales shows commission card (0 EUR, 250 EUR per sale) - PASSED
AppInstaladores login page loads at /app-instaladores - PASSED
AppInstaladores login shows agenda with stats - PASSED
CRA Dashboard shows stats (2 installations, 18 devices, 3 pending) - PASSED
CRA Dashboard shows 12 alarms with real data - PASSED
CRA Dashboard shows 2 installations (Juan Garcia Martinez, Oficina Central) - PASSED
CRA Dashboard shows 4 protocols (Intrusion, Panico/SOS, Sabotaje, Incendio) - PASSED
CRA Dashboard Socket.IO attempts connection (falls back to POLL mode) - PASSED

features_verified: Socket.IO connection attempt (falls back to polling)

socket_io_status.note: Socket.IO WebSocket fails due to Kubernetes ingress configuration, but polling fallback works correctly
